counter_evidence: Crunchbase shows total funding of $12M, not $25M. The $25M figure does not appear in any funding announcement.
adversary_evidence: Source states: 'Artisan AI has raised a total of $12M in funding over 2 rounds. Their latest funding was raised on Jun 15, 2024 from a Series A round.' — contradicts claim of $25M total funding

counter_evidence: LinkedIn shows 30-35 employees, company about page says 'team of ~40'
adversary_evidence: Source states: 'Meet our team of ~40 passionate builders' on artisan.co/about — discrepancy with claim of 45 employees. LinkedIn company page shows 32 associated profiles.

claim_text: Regie.ai total funding is between $30M and $35M
counter_evidence: Sources disagree on exact amount. Crunchbase says $30.4M, PitchBook says $34.5M. The CONFLICTING marker is appropriate but the range understates the disagreement.
adversary_evidence: Source states: 'Regie.ai has raised $30.4M in 3 rounds' (Crunchbase) vs 'Total raised: $34.5M' (PitchBook) — discrepancy between sources. Researcher already flagged as CONFLICTING which is correct, but confidence should be lower given the $4M gap.
